description_long: This is a robust, full-bodied cow with a predominantly gray coat interspersed with irregular white patches, giving it a striking and easily recognizable appearance. Its head is broad and features a white face with a dark muzzle, complemented by two prominent, slightly curved horns. The ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed, and project outward from the sides of the head. The cow's body is muscular and rounded, with a visible udder beneath, indicating it is a mature female. Its legs are sturdy and end in dark hooves, supporting its substantial frame. The tail is long and slender, hanging straight down with a tuft of hair at the end.
description: A large, gray cow with white patches, prominent horns, a white face, and a visible udder, displaying a strong and healthy build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad white face, both horns, and the symmetrical placement of the ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full body profile, visible udder, and the hanging tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the width of the hindquarters, the udder, and the tail hanging straight down.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the body profile, horns, and the distinct white markings on the flank.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed, and extend outward from the sides of the head, with a gentle curve and a soft, fleshy appearance.
attribute_pattern_distinctiveness: The coat pattern is highly distinctive, with sharp, irregular white patches contrasting strongly against the dominant gray background. The markings are unique and well-defined, making the animal easily identifiable.
